{{Quote|I had my suspicions at Arda I that something was not right.|[[Urel Haydon]]|<ref name="Onslaught" />}}
'''Arda I''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Arda system/Legends|Arda system]], a part of the [[Back Reach]] area of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] within the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Ardan Cross]] connected it to the [[Feldwes system/Legends|Feldwes]] and [[Kalishik system/Legends|Kalishik systems]], and another hyperlane linked it to the [[Capella system/Legends|Capella system]].<ref name="TEA" />

Arda I concealed a hidden [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Arda Base|base]] in a canyon known as [[The Gauntlet (Arda I)|the Gauntlet]].<ref name="Onslaught" />

{{Planet-stub}}
